title: Candidate Unified-Physics Framework
description: A candidate framework that is to be evaluated against the benchmark set. The 'predictions' map is keyed by benchmark id and supplies whatever input the corresponding benchmark.framework_inputs requires.

id.description: Stable slug used as the filename.

summary.description: One-paragraph plain-English description of the framework, what it modifies relative to the SM+GR baseline, and what it claims to explain.

lineage.description: Origin papers / canonical references for the framework itself (not for individual predictions).

predictions.description: Map from benchmark id to the framework's prediction for that benchmark. Every benchmark id present must resolve to a file in benchmarks/.

kind.description: value = numerical prediction supplied; by_construction = framework reproduces the standard prediction by structural identity (e.g. GR predicts c_gw = c without computation); not_applicable = framework claims the benchmark is outside its scope (this is itself a position that must be defended elsewhere); open = framework has not yet computed this.

value.description: The numerical prediction. Required when kind == 'value'.

uncertainty.description: Theoretical or parametric uncertainty on the prediction.

note.description: One-line plain-English explanation of how the prediction is obtained or why the kind was chosen.

reference.description: Primary literature where this prediction is derived for this framework. Required for kind == 'value'; recommended for 'by_construction'.

composes_mechanisms.description: List of mechanisms/<id> entries that this framework composes. Used to derive total puzzle coverage and parameter cost from the mechanism graph rather than restating it. Cross-checked by the validator.
